data.name: Midnight Paradise
data.detailed_description:
Connor's young adult life has been a whirlwind of carefree indulgence, with easy access to both money and pleasure. But after a disastrous year at college, his world begins to crumble. Forced to return home, Connor must face the consequences of his actions and confront those he left behind two years ago. Given an ultimatum, he must either rise to the challenges ahead and prove his worth or watch as his future slips away.

Midnight Paradise is a unique blend of dating simulation and visual novel elements, drawing you into the captivating story of Connor's return to Midnight City, his hometown. As you explore this world, you'll interact with a variety of characters, each with their own storylines and potential paths. Your decisions shape the outcome, leading to multiple love interests and diverging narratives that keep you coming back for more.

Uncover your house's secrets!

Ever since you came back something feels off. Your rival's weird experiment, the girls' behavior - and the old man seemingly never sleeps.

Find out what happened while you were gone and solve the mystery!

Build relationships!

No matter if you like blondes or brunettes, you'll find many hotties to fit into your harem!

High-Quality Rendered Images

Immerse yourself in stunning visuals that bring every scene to life.

Animated Erotic Scenes

Experience the passion with beautifully crafted, animated sequences.

Sandbox-Style Gameplay

Enjoy the freedom to explore and interact in an open environment from the very beginning.

Character Affection System

Unlock new events by increasing characters' affection levels.
Are you taking the romantic route or are you going to dominate your love interests? The choice is yours!

Gallery with Scene Replay

Revisit your favorite moments anytime with the scene replay feature.

Smartphone System

Stay connected with in-game characters and events through an intuitive smartphone interface.

Experience a variety of fetishes, including:

Anal Sex, BDSM, Corruption, Exhibitionism, Foot Fetish, MILF, Threesome FFM, Voyeurism

(You can avoid foot stuff if you're not into it)

data.short_description: In Midnight Paradise you play as a college dropout who has nothing to lose and everything to prove! Compete against your rival on the path to riches, power and for the hearts of the sexiest girls! But beware, the people around you are keeping secrets. Can you find out the truth before it's too late?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
